count_state.note: BTC-USD.json covers 2014-09-17 to 2026-07-06 (4310 rows) -- real intraday OHLC from its very first row. Own-longest-series self-anchor (dashboard_build_spec.md §2), independent of any other instrument's degree claim -- Bitcoin is its own asset class, no equity/bond/metal/oil 'principle of commonality' stand-in applies. The fixed Minor (IV)/(V) anchor intentionally omits a (III)-equivalent peak label for the real 2013 top ($1,135, per the module docstring's cited sources) -- that peak predates this repo's own fetched history.

invalidation.basis: A confirmed daily close below the real 2015-01-14 low would invalidate the Minor (V)/Minute-in-progress hypothesis.

halving_cycle.reason: 815 days since the 2024-04-20 halving (past the historically observed 518-546 day post-halving top window, 2025-09-20..2025-10-18)

mayer.reason: Mayer Multiple 0.85 (accumulation) -- bubble > 2.4, accumulation < 1.0, long-term average ~1.45

onchain_valuation.reason: MVRV Z-Score 0.37 (neutral range), NUPL 0.158 (hope/fear), SOPR 0.972 (capitulation), spot above realized price (52,493) -- BGeometrics free-tier history starts 2022-06-27, so this reading has no visibility into BTC's own 2015/2017-18/2020-21 cycles

puell.reason: Puell Multiple 0.719 (normal) -- red/top zone > 3.4, green/bottom zone < 0.5; cycle-context only, not a standalone timing signal

hash_ribbons.reason: 30d/60d hashrate mean normal (30d >= 60d); last cross: recovery buy on 2026-07-08 -- calendar-day windows over blockchain.info's ~4-day-sampled series (~8/~15 samples per window)

sentiment.label: Extreme Fear
sentiment.reason: Crypto Fear & Greed 22 (Extreme Fear) -- contrarian-fade framing: Extreme Fear (<=24) reads accumulate, Extreme Greed (>=75) reads distribute, Fear/Greed in between carries no directional vote. BTC dominance and social/search (tool_spec.md's fuller sentiment signal list) aren't fetched -- this reading is Fear & Greed only.

lenses.name: hurst_underlying_trend
lenses.reason: Hickson underlying-trend vote across cycles longer than 80D: normalized=-0.33 (6 cycle(s) counted)

lenses.name: vtl
lenses.reason: most recently confirmed higher-degree turn: trough of 2026-07-01, confirmed 2026-07-02

lenses.name: btc_cycle_models
lenses.reason: Mayer Multiple 0.85 (accumulation) -- bubble > 2.4, accumulation < 1.0, long-term average ~1.45; 111DMA 70370 vs 2x350DMA 175490 (below); last crossover 2021-04-11

lenses.name: btc_onchain_valuation
lenses.reason: MVRV Z-Score 0.37 (neutral range), NUPL 0.158 (hope/fear), SOPR 0.972 (capitulation), spot above realized price (52,493) -- BGeometrics free-tier history starts 2022-06-27, so this reading has no visibility into BTC's own 2015/2017-18/2020-21 cycles

lenses.name: btc_miner
lenses.reason: Puell Multiple 0.719 (normal) -- red/top zone > 3.4, green/bottom zone < 0.5; cycle-context only, not a standalone timing signal; 30d/60d hashrate mean normal (30d >= 60d); last cross: recovery buy on 2026-07-08 -- calendar-day windows over blockchain.info's ~4-day-sampled series (~8/~15 samples per window)

lenses.name: btc_sentiment
lenses.reason: Crypto Fear & Greed 22 (Extreme Fear) -- contrarian-fade framing: Extreme Fear (<=24) reads accumulate, Extreme Greed (>=75) reads distribute, Fear/Greed in between carries no directional vote. BTC dominance and social/search (tool_spec.md's fuller sentiment signal list) aren't fetched -- this reading is Fear & Greed only.

deferred_tools.btc_supply_holder: not built -- HODL Waves/CDD/LTH-STH supply data not fetched (tool_spec.md's own 'Data reality' caveat)
deferred_tools.btc_derivatives: not built -- funding rate/OI/basis/skew/liquidations need Coinglass/Laevitas, not fetched
deferred_tools.btc_flows_macro: partially built as macro_correlation below (DXY/SPY/GLD correlation) -- the tool's own dominant signal (spot-ETF net flows, exchange netflow) needs Farside/SoSoValue, not fetched

trace.count_state: counts/BTC-USD.json (this instrument's own bootstrap, self-anchored, never inherited)
trace.hurst: lib.hurst_overlay.build_hurst_overlay(BTC-USD.json, ['20D', '40D', '80D', '20W', '40W'], origin_date=None) -- note: BTC trades every calendar day, so these cycle labels are literal calendar-day counts, not 5-day-week trading-day counts the way they are on an equity panel (see module docstring)
trace.btc_lenses.halving_cycle: lib.btc_halving.state(build_date) -- deterministic calendar function, no fetched data
trace.btc_lenses.cycle_models: lib.btc_cycle_models on BTC-USD.json's own closes (Mayer Multiple, Pi-Cycle Top)
trace.confluence: tool_spec.md's own stated rule: no BTC metric stands alone -- majority direction across whichever lenses actually vote (hurst_underlying_trend, vtl, btc_cycle_models, btc_onchain_valuation, btc_miner, btc_sentiment)
trace.macro_correlation: lib.ratio.ratio_series/trend_divergence_flag/price_window on BTC-USD vs DXY/SPY/GLD/ETH-USD -- descriptive only, never a vote, same posture as every equity/metal/oil panel's own comparative spine; price_window is the same trailing 20-session window trend_divergence_flag reads, both instruments' own closes
